We plan to update the game to version 1.1.08: Starlit Blaze on 【UTC 2026/6/3 06:00】. The servers will be down for an estimated 【3 hours】 during the update. We apologize for any inconvenience this might cause and will send you a reward as compensation once the update is complete.

=Summer Solstice Event Series=
Firefly lantern bright, light up the midsummer night. The Summer Solstice event series is coming soon, and we have prepared exciting content for you to enjoy:
